title: miliusa cambodgensis
intro: Miliusa cambodgensis is a species of plant in the family Annonaceae, commonly known as the Cambodian milu or fragrant milu. This plant is traditionally used in Southeast Asian medicine, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Miliusa cambodgensis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and aid in the treatment of various infectious diseases. The plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for medicinal purposes, and its leaves and flowers are used in traditional herbal remedies.
